issues.description: Text states '[Your Turn]' which indicates the effect lasts during your turn only, not until end of turn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.
Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' (effect applies at start of your turn when condition is met), not 'Activated' (which implies a player-triggered activation).
Condition references 'HasRestingDon' but card text says 'DON!! cards on your field' which typically means attached DON!!. Should likely be 'HasAttachedDon' unless 'resting' is intentional.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains +1000 power.
